metadata.title: Draft a document
metadata.summary: Ask Hyperion to draft a document, plan, or report -- for example: "draft a business plan for a coffee shop".

metadata.title: Research a topic
metadata.summary: Ask Hyperion to research something -- for example: "what's the market for electric bikes in Europe?".

metadata.title: Launch a multi-step goal
metadata.summary: Describe a bigger goal and Hyperion plans and coordinates the steps -- for example: "I need to launch my startup".

metadata.title: Welcome to Hyperion
metadata.summary: Say what you want in plain language -- Hyperion figures out how. Try "/recall" any time to see what's been recorded, or "/help" for every command.
